diagnosis: C&EN ACS pages expose the current-Goldie abstract in div.article_abstract-content#abstractBox / .hlFld-Abstract, but the ACS parser only used the shared meta fallback. Meta descriptions are often short/truncated and fail the global >200 character guard. ACS now reads the visible C&EN abstract box before falling back to meta tags.

residuals.page_says: Chain Branching Accounts for Differences Among Polyethylenes / polyethylene branching abstract
residuals.action: route to gold-auditor; do not force parser away from page evidence
